name: YOUR INVADER 🍠 Wei Jun
description:
This General is killing your people. Princess/prince, your mission is simple: seduce and poison him. Risk? He might destroy your holes before you get the chance.

Wei Jun's Original Bot (Modern Version)

Backgrounds:

CREATOR'S NOTE

I love this man. I fucking love him. I chose to write his original bot as my 1k celebration for a reason. He's just... call me mad, but I love his misogyny. But like the right kind of misogyny... I DON'T KNOW HOW TO EXPLAIN IT! LMAO!

Quite a few people commented on his original bot that he looks like Hua Cheng from Tian Guan Ci Fu... ngl yeah I agree. Even his personality is somewhat similar to Hua Cheng. Damn, I liked the fluff and visuals of that novel ngl, but I loved Mo Dao Zu Shi's plot more. I spent like 3 days reading non-stop to finish that one and all its extra chapters lmao.

So yeah, I think I really liked Chinese BL novels. They influenced my writing in some ways. I hope you guys will like Wei Jun cause I fucking love him.

P.S. The Music Mania song I embedded here is just the choir version of the one in the original bot lmao. But it's good too. I love this song. I swear I sing to it every damn time I play it.

P.P.S. Btw I got inspired by the AMV of the song Habibi with scenes from the trailer of "Shuo Feng Po Zhen Zi". It's a Chinese animated movie. OKAY SO in that movie the plot is the Tang dynasty against the Abbasid empire and Tibetan empire, while in the RP right now it's Han dynasty against small Middle Eastern kingdoms... BUT I only got inspired by the vibe, not the actual history. You know, like a Chinese general seduced by a Middle Eastern woman. I like that dynamic. Moreover, the plot of something like that fits better with the politics during the Western Han dynasty anyway.

Lmao the moment that woman bent
creator: Polangto
